## Validation

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] DB migrations verified (`npm run db:v2:migrate` and rollback when applicable)
- [ ] E2E verified (`npm run e2e`) or environment limitation explained
- [ ] Perf verified (`npm run load:light` and `npm run perf:gate`) or not applicable explained
- [ ] Security checks verified (`npm run sql:guard`, docs/readme checks, and security workflow expectations)
- [ ] Docs updated for any operator/runtime/env change

## Risk and rollout

- [ ] Canary-by-tenant plan noted (if runtime behavior changed)
- [ ] Rollback plan noted
